name: getUserFromContextOrDB retrieves user from context
description: When user is already in context (set by AuthMiddleware), it should be returned without DB query

steps.name: ASSERT: User should not be nil

parameters.name: Actual
parameters.value: *user.User(&user.User{AcceptedTermsAt:time.Date(1, time.January, 1, 0, 0, 0, 0, time.UTC), AvatarUrl:(*string)(nil), Bio:(*string)(nil), Country:core.Map(nil), CreatedAt:time.Date(1, time.January, 1, 0, 0, 0, 0, time.UTC), DeletedAt:(*core.NullTime)(nil), Email:"", FirstLoginTime:time.Date(1, time.January, 1, 0, 0, 0, 0, time.UTC), FirstName:"", ID:[16]uint8{0x21, 0xaf, 0x4, 0x6a, 0xcc, 0x37, 0x47, 0x7c, 0xa3, 0xd3, 0x1d, 0xb, 0x8e, 0x6b, 0xec, 0x6f}, LastLoginTime:time.Date(1, time.January, 1, 0, 0, 0, 0, time.UTC), LastName:"", Organizations:(*struct { OrganizationsWithRoles *[]map[string]interface {} "db:\"organizations_with_roles\" json:\"organizationsWithRoles\" yaml:\"organizationsWithRoles\""; TotalCount *int "db:\"total_count\" json:\"totalCount\" yaml:\"totalCount\"" })(nil), Preferences:(*user.Preference)(nil), Provider:"", Region:core.Map(nil), RoleNames:(*[]user.UserRoleNames)(nil), Socials:(*user.UserSocials)(nil), Status:"", Teams:(*struct { TeamsWithRoles *[]map[string]interface {} "db:\"teams_with_roles\" json:\"teamsWithRoles\" yaml:\"teamsWithRoles\""; TotalCount *int "db:\"total_count\" json:\"totalCount\" yaml:\"totalCount\"" })(nil), UpdatedAt:time.Date(1, time.January, 1, 0, 0, 0, 0, time.UTC), UserId:""})
